rules.rule_text:
rule ole_object : info ole windows
{
	meta:
		description = "Detect OLE (Object Linking and Embedding)"

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0xd0cf11e0 and uint32be( 4 ) == 0xa1b11ae1
}

rule_metadata.name: embedded_ole_object
rule_metadata.description: Detect embedded OLE (Object Linking and Embedding)

rule_metadata.name: ole_equation_editor
rule_metadata.description: Detect embedded CLSID OLE of Equation Editor used in CVE-2017-11882
